statement: Post-disclosure congressional cluster-buy signals may have short-horizon alpha only when validated on a strict no-leak clock and confirmed by options aggression plus liquid breakout conditions.
entry_trigger: At T+1 session (10:15-11:30 ET), enter long only if all conditions hold: (1) >=2 BUY disclosures for same ticker became publicly available within prior 7 calendar days using availability timestamp only; discard signals older than 21 days, (2) call sweep notional >= 500k and sweep z-score > 2.0 vs 60-session baseline, (3) close > 20-day high and relative volume >= 1.3, (4) spread <= 25 bps, ADV >= 40M, and opening gap <= 4%.
exit_trigger: Exit at earliest of +5.5% TP, -3.0% stop, 5 trading-day timeout, 2-session options reversal (put premium > call premium), or forced T-1 exit before earnings.
event_window: Open positions only during T+1 to T+3 trading days after the cluster disclosure becomes public.
expected_decay_timeline: Edge half-life expected by day 4-5 post-public disclosure.

risk_controls.gap_through_stop_rule: fill at next tradable print with slippage penalty
risk_controls.crowding_filter: reject if pre-entry D-3 return > 9% or social/options popularity > 90th percentile
